entries.title: Gmail - Email from Google
entries.summary:
* Gmail uses a sign-in system to authenticate users.
* Users can sign in with their email or phone number.
* Gmail has a Guest mode for private browsing.
* A CAPTCHA system is used to verify user input.
* Users can create a new account from the sign-in page.
* Forgot email feature is available for account recovery.
* Gmail uses a multi-step sign-in process.
* User authentication is required to access the Gmail service.
* Guest mode provides a private and temporary access to Gmail.
* CAPTCHA is used to prevent automated sign-in attempts.

entries.title: Microsoft Outlook Personal Email and Calendar | Microsoft 365
entries.summary:
* Microsoft Outlook available on desktop, mobile, and web
* Supports multiple email accounts, including Outlook.com, Gmail, Yahoo!, iCloud
* Features AI-powered email assistant and generator
* Includes shared calendar and contacts management
* Offers enterprise-grade security with attachment and link scanning
* Supports encryption to prevent forwarding of sensitive information
* Integrates with Word, Excel, and PowerPoint for file editing and sharing
* Includes OneDrive for secure file storage and linking
* Features focused inbox and sweep features for email organization
* Includes Copilot AI with Microsoft 365 Personal or Family subscription
* Microsoft Outlook integrates with Microsoft Copilot for AI-powered email drafting and summarization.
* Copilot in Outlook supports outlook.com, hotmail.com, live.com, and msn.com email addresses.
* Outlook offers 15 GB of mailbox storage in its free plan.
* Microsoft 365 Basic plan includes 100 GB of mailbox storage and 100 GB of cloud storage.
* Microsoft 365 Personal plan includes 1 TB of secure cloud storage.
* Outlook offers core security features like spam filters in its free plan.
* Advanced Outlook security features are available in Microsoft 365 Basic and Personal plans.
* Microsoft 365 plans include access to Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and OneDrive apps.
* Outlook is available on web, desktop, and mobile apps.
* Microsoft 365 plans support use on multiple devices simultaneously.
* 1 TB (1000 GB) of secure cloud storage per user

entries.title: What does Social mean? - Definitions.net
entries.summary:
* Numerical value of "Social" in Chaldean Numerology: 9
* Numerical value of "Social" in Pythagorean Numerology: 5
* References: Princeton's WordNet, Wiktionary, Samuel Johnson's Dictionary, Wikipedia
* Translations: Arabic (مجتمعي, اجتماعي), Catalan (social), Czech (sociální, společenský)
* Language support: US English, British, Australian, Indian, South African
* Related terms: community-based, social media, social concerns
* Data format: JSON (e.g. [["2001","4405403"]])
* Anagrams: colias, scolia
* Sign language support: available

entries.title: What Does social Mean? Definition & Examples | Dictionary.net
entries.summary:
* "Social" refers to community engagement or relationships.
* In business, "social" involves activities for relationship-building.
* Community engagement is a key aspect of social activities.
* Social gatherings are meant for enjoyment or community interaction.
* Business social activities aim to cultivate relationships.
* Community is a core concept in social interactions.
* Relationship-building is a primary goal of social business activities.
* Social events can be used for community engagement and relationship-building.
* Enjoyment is a key aspect of social gatherings.
* Social interactions can be used to foster community and relationships.

entries.title: Online Python Compiler (Interpreter) - Programiz
entries.summary:
* Online Python compiler supports Python 3.
* Code can be written and run directly in the online editor.
* The compiler provides an output section to display results.
* A "Run" button is used to execute the Python code.
* A "Clear" button is available to reset the output.
* The online compiler allows code sharing via link or copy.
* The editor has a "Copy Link" feature for easy sharing.
* Code can be saved as a file (e.g., main.py).
* The online compiler is accessible via the Programiz website.
* The compiler provides a simple interface for writing and running Python code.

entries.title: Python (programming language) - Wikipedia
entries.summary:
* Python has functional programming tools like filter, map, and reduce functions.
* List comprehensions, dictionaries, sets, and generator expressions are supported.
* The standard library includes modules like itertools and functools for functional programming.
* Python's core philosophy is outlined in the Zen of Python (PEP 20), emphasizing readability and simplicity.
* Python is designed to be highly extensible through modules.
* The language lacks do..while loops, considered harmful by Guido van Rossum.
* Python prioritizes readability over performance, rejecting patches that compromise clarity.
* Execution speed can be improved using extension modules written in languages like C.
* Just-in-time compilers like PyPy can also improve execution speed.
* Python code can be transpiled to other languages for potential speed improvements.
* Python tuples are immutable objects.
* Tuples can be modified by reassigning a new tuple to the original variable.
* Parentheses are optional for tuples in unambiguous contexts.
* Sequence unpacking allows multiple expressions to be assigned to multiple variables.
* Tuples can be concatenated using the `+` operator.
* Tuple concatenation creates a new tuple object.
* The `+` operator evaluates the expression on the right side first.
* The result of the expression is then assigned back to the original variable.
* Tuple modification is achieved through reassignment, not in-place modification.
* Python supports multiple assignment through sequen

entries.title: Influencer - Wikipedia
entries.summary:
* Influencer marketing involves collaboration between advertisers and influencers to promote services on social media.
* Micro-influencers (10,000-100,000 followers) and nano-influencers (1,000-10,000 followers) have higher engagement rates and are perceived as more relatable and credible.
* B2C marketing is a common method used by influencers to promote products directly to their target audiences.
* Influencer marketing differs from traditional advertising in the way the message is communicated, with product advertising embedded in influencer-created content.
* Regulatory scrutiny of influencer advertising transparency has increased, with updated FTC guidelines requiring disclosure of gifted arrangements and paid promotions.
* Specialized platforms like AspireIQ and Grin assist brands in managing networks of niche creators.
* Influencers typically promote a lifestyle of beauty and luxury fashion, fostering consumer-brand relationships and selling merchandise.
* Digital branding encompasses all online experiences and necessitates value provision.
* Influencer marketing can compromise the authenticity of an influencer's content due to brand partnerships.
* FTC guidelines require creators to disclose more information about paid promotions and gifted arrangements.
* Influencers deal with authenticity issues through "passionate authenticity" or "transparent authenticity".
* Two main categories of influencers: human influencers (HI) and virtual influencers (VI).
* Virtual influenc

entries.title: The 25 Most Influential Social Media Influencers and Creators of 2025
entries.summary:
* Social media influencers use relatable content to attract and retain followers.
* Video content can be used to support local businesses and philanthropic causes.
* Consistency and authenticity are key to building a loyal fan base.
* Influencers can leverage their platforms to promote their own products or investments.
* TikTok is a popular platform for creators to build their personal brand.
* Engaging with followers through storytelling and sharing personal struggles can increase loyalty.
* Influencers can expand their reach by appearing in mainstream media, such as TV commercials.
* Podcasts can be adapted to include more video content to engage with audiences.
* Social media platforms can be used to promote and sell products, such as canned cocktails.
* Influencers can use their platforms to speak out on social and political issues.
* Social media influencers use storytelling and strong voices to stand out in a crowded content landscape.
* Video-forward content, or "vlogcasts," are becoming increasingly popular.
* Creators are leveraging their direct line to their audience to produce content without traditional industry constraints.
* Podcasting is a key platform for influencers to connect with their audience and discuss various topics.
* Audiobooks are being used by creators to tell stories and reach their audience in new ways.
* Social media platforms are allowing creators to mix and match different formats and genres.
* Influencers are using their platforms to discuss
